name: Nexus Infrastructure plc
summary: Nexus Infrastructure plc provides specialized infrastructure and engineering services to the housebuilding and commercial sectors in the United Kingdom. It operates through three segments: Tamdown, TriConnex, and eSmart Networks. The company undertakes earthworks; builds highways, substructures, and basements; and installs drainage systems, as well as engages in high-rise construction activities. It also designs, installs, and connects gas, electricity, water, and fiber networks for residential and commercial developments; provides electric vehicle charging infrastructure, battery storage, and connections to renewable energy sources; and offers public electric vehicle charging and smart energy infrastructure. The company was formerly known as Garbol plc and changed its name to Nexus Infrastructure plc in June 2016. Nexus Infrastructure plc was founded in 1976 and is based in Braintree, the United Kingdom.
